description: Start a Tekton Pipeline by creating a PipelineRun that references it

name.description: Name of the Pipeline to start

params.description: Parameter values to pass to the Pipeline. Keys are parameter names; values can be a string, an array of strings, or an object (map of string to string) depending on the parameter type defined in the Pipeline spec

name: tekton_pipeline_start
title: Tekton: Start Pipeline

description: Restart a Tekton PipelineRun by creating a new PipelineRun with the same spec

name.description: Name of the PipelineRun to restart

name: tekton_pipelinerun_restart
title: Tekton: Restart PipelineRun

description: Start a Tekton Task by creating a TaskRun that references it

name.description: Name of the Task to start

params.description: Parameter values to pass to the Task. Keys are parameter names; values can be a string, an array of strings, or an object (map of string to string) depending on the parameter type defined in the Task spec

name: tekton_task_start
title: Tekton: Start Task

description: Get the logs from a Tekton TaskRun by resolving its underlying pod

name.description: Name of the TaskRun to get logs from

tail.description: Number of lines to retrieve from the end of the logs (Optional, default: 100)

name: tekton_taskrun_logs
title: Tekton: Get TaskRun Logs

description: Restart a Tekton TaskRun by creating a new TaskRun with the same spec

name.description: Name of the TaskRun to restart

name: tekton_taskrun_restart
title: Tekton: Restart TaskRun
